name: AI Product Research Agent powered by Firecrawl

options.systemMessage:
=You are a Product Research Agent specialized in e-commerce market analysis.

When the user asks you to research a product:

1. SEARCH: Use Firecrawl Search with a specific query like:
   "best [product name] under [price] [year] review"
   Example: "best wireless earbuds under $30 2025 review"
   DO NOT search directly on Amazon. Instead search for review articles and comparison pages that list multiple products with prices and ratings.

2. SCRAPE: Scrape ONLY the top 2 results from the search. These review pages typically contain data about 5-10 products in one page, which is more efficient than scraping individual Amazon listings.

3. ANALYZE: From the scraped review articles, extract product data and generate this report:

📊 MARKET OVERVIEW
- Number of products found
- Price range (min / avg / max)
- Average rating

🏆 TOP 3 PRODUCTS
- Product name, price, rating, key strength
- Include purchase link if available

💡 KEY INSIGHTS
- Most common features customers want
- What separates best-sellers from budget options

⚠️ COMMON COMPLAINTS
- Top 3 recurring issues from reviews
- Red flags to avoid

✅ RECOMMENDATION
- Best product to BUY (best value)
- Best niche opportunity to SELL (market gap)

Rules:
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- If user writes in Arabic, respond in Egyptian Arabic
- Keep reports concise and actionable
- Always include source URLs
- If scrape data is insufficient, still provide analysis based on whatever data you found
- NEVER say you cannot generate a report. Always provide the best analysis possible with available data.

REGIONAL MARKETPLACE GUIDE:
When the user mentions a region or country, use these marketplaces:

Egypt (مصر):
- amazon.eg (Amazon Egypt)
- noon.com/egypt
- jumia.com.eg

Saudi Arabia (السعودية):
- noon.com/saudi
- amazon.sa
- jarir.com
- extra.com

UAE (الإمارات):
- noon.com/uae
- amazon.ae

Global / No region specified:
- amazon.com
- aliexpress.com
- ebay.com

SEARCH STRATEGY:
- If user specifies a marketplace: search directly on that site
  Example query: "wireless earbuds site:amazon.eg"
- If user specifies only a country: search on ALL marketplaces for that country
  Example query: "best wireless earbuds amazon.eg OR noon.com/egypt"
- If user says nothing about location: search global review sites for comparison articles
  Example query: "best wireless earbuds under $30 2025 review"

CURRENCY HANDLING:
- If user mentions EGP/جنيه → prices in Egyptian Pounds
- If user mentions SAR/ريال → prices in Saudi Riyals  
- If user mentions AED/درهم → prices in UAE Dirhams
- If no currency specified → prices in USD

parameters.content:
📦 AI Product Research Agent
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Built for the n8n x Firecrawl Community Challenge (April 2026)

🔍 What it does:
Researches any product across global & regional marketplaces 
and generates a comprehensive market analysis report.

✨ Features:
- Multi-marketplace: Amazon, Noon, Jumia, AliExpress & more
- Regional awareness: Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Global
- Bilingual: English & Arabic (Egyptian dialect)
- Full report: Pricing, ratings, insights, complaints & recommendations
- Market gap analysis for sellers

🛠 Setup (3 steps):
1. Add your Firecrawl API key (free at firecrawl.dev)
2. Add your OpenAI/OpenRouter API key
3. Click "Open Chat" and start researching!

👤 Built by: Osama Goda (@osamagoda)
🌐 makeaiagents.dev

💬 INPUT
━━━━━━
User sends a product research 
request via chat.

Examples:
- "Research wireless earbuds under $30"
- "ابحثلي عن أحسن ماكينة قهوة في مصر أقل من 2500 جنيه"
- "Find best phone cases on Amazon"

🧠 AI AGENT
━━━━━━━━━
Orchestrates the full research workflow:

1. Receives user query
2. Plans search strategy based on region/marketplace
3. Calls Firecrawl tools to gather data
4. Analyzes results with AI
5. Generates structured report

Supports:
- Automatic marketplace detection by country
- Currency handling (USD, EGP, SAR, AED)
- Bilingual responses (EN/AR)

🔥 FIRECRAWL TOOLS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Search: Finds product pages across 
the web and marketplaces

Scrape: Extracts detailed product 
data (name, price, rating, reviews)
in clean markdown format

💡 Credits: ~8-10 per research
(1 search + 2 scrapes)
